title: Feodo Tracker connector configuration
description: Imports the abuse.ch Feodo Tracker C2 IP blocklist as wm:Indicator entities.

url.title: Feed URL
url.description: URL of the Feodo Tracker IP blocklist JSON feed (over the SSRF guard). Falls back to the pinned default feed when omitted.

limit.title: Record limit
limit.description: Optional cap on the number of indicators collected (testing / incremental runs).
